headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today for deep work on the two active evals tickets (AE-744 UX and AE-1079 design doc).

quick_wins.why: Ticket is still To Do; an outline unblocks moving it to In Progress and gets early feedback

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken — you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.why: Major priority, In Progress, and directly tied to the Evals pillar of the Agents big rock; no due date means it could drift

must_make_progress.task: AE-1079: Move to In Progress with a first-pass design doc for generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Supports evals adoption OKR and unblocks engineering scoping

must_communicate_with.about: Align on whether AE-1079 no-ground-truth approach intersects with Context Engineering or Memory roadmap work
Share progress on AE-744 evaluator UX to keep Agents big rock status green

must_report_status.topic: Evals UX and generated evaluations progress
must_report_status.note: Next TR check-in may be approaching; pre-update the wiki page with current status so you're not scrambling

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake metrics integration is down (empty password) — product telemetry and OKR tracking are blind.
Both evals tickets have no due dates set — risk of silent slippage. Consider adding target dates.
No Slack activity in 16h — unusually quiet; verify Slack integration is working correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the prerequisite to regaining visibility on escalations and adoption metrics.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data unavailable due to broken metrics pipeline; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 are the primary levers for driving evals adoption this sprint.

slack_summary: No meetings, no inbound messages — today is a deep-work day. Top priorities: (1) make significant progress on AE-744 evaluator UX (Major, In Progress) and (2) draft the AE-1079 no-ground-truth design doc to move it off To Do. Also flag: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and metrics — get credentials fixed. Zero meetings today.
